one_time_description: Share of income from Alexis owned enterprises (government business enterprises) accounted for by modified equity method - auditors unable to verify carrying amount
economic_notes: Nation has government business enterprises accounted for by modified equity method. COVID-19 impacted ability to provide services and generate self-source revenues through subsidiaries. Economic Development COVID-19 Support of $1,257,071 expended.
notes: Qualified audit opinion due to inability to verify investments in government business enterprises (modified equity method). Share of income from Alexis owned enterprises of $9,912,519 is large and unverifiable. Two fully consolidated subsidiaries: Northern ISGA Foundation and Alexis Board of Education. Advances to Alexis owned enterprises of $31,541,541 on balance sheet. Alexis Settlement Trust of $11,308,789 also on balance sheet. Revenue figure of $35,262,371 is net of contributions carried forward. ISC funding total calculated as block + fixed + flexible + set + health contributions. Total government transfers includes ISC + health + CMHC + Alberta/Federal grants + YTC grants. OSR includes other revenue, consultation revenue, settlement trust, Northern ISGA Foundation, admin fees COVID less lapsed ISC.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
High ISC dependency (101.68%) — operations heavily reliant on federal transfers
